sidebar.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your tours.
map.emptyBody: Upload a GPX file to see your route as a heatmap.
detail.dropPhotos: Drop or click to add photos (JPEG/PNG)
help.title: How to use BikeBuddy
help.a1: Upload GPX tracks from your rides — cycling or motorcycling — and see them as an interactive heatmap. Warmer colours mean you rode there more often.
help.a2: Sign in to upload tours and have them saved to your account.
help.a3: Click Upload GPX, give it a name, and drop a .gpx file. It appears on the map straight away.
help.a4: The sidebar lists your tours. Use the search box to filter and the dropdown to sort by date, name, or length. Click a tour to focus it; Show All Tours brings back the combined heatmap.
help.a5: Open a tour to add photos, edit, or delete it. Toggle Photo pins on the map to show geotagged photos where they were taken.

toast.accountDeleted: Your data has been deleted. Your login will be fully removed shortly.
toast.accountDeleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.
confirm.deleteTour: Delete this tour? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteAccount: Permanently delete your account? Your tours and photos are removed immediately; your sign-in is fully removed shortly after. This cannot be undone.
